services: leak and pipe repair, drain cleaning, water heater repair and installation, and emergency service
service_area: the greater metro area, about a 30-mile radius
hours: 8am-6pm Monday through Saturday, with 24/7 emergency service for leaks, no water, and backups
pricing_notes: service-call fee is around $79 and is waived if they book the repair; water heater installs get a quick quote; never quote a firm install price over the phone
booking_notes: find out if it is an emergency (leak, no water, sewage backup) and prioritize it; collect name, service address, a description of the problem, and a preferred day and time window
emergency_examples: a burst or leaking pipe, no hot water, a sewage backup, or water flooding a room
